Bash(/tmp/extract_docx4.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
# Read file bytes to avoid lock issues
$bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\('C:\\projekte\\one.app\\Schadensliste.docx'\)
$memStream = New-Object System.IO.MemoryStream\(,$bytes\)

Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
$zip = New-Object System.IO.Compression.ZipArchive\($memStream, [System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Read\)

Write-Output "=== ZIP ENTRIES ==="
foreach \($e in $zip.Entries\) {
    Write-Output \("  " + $e.FullName\)
}

$entry = $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq 'word/document.xml' }
$stream = $entry.Open\(\)
$reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\)
$xml = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\)
$reader.Close\(\)
$zip.Dispose\(\)
$memStream.Dispose\(\)

Write-Output ""
Write-Output "=== EXTRACTED TEXT ==="

[xml]$doc = $xml
$nsMgr = New-Object System.Xml.XmlNamespaceManager\($doc.NameTable\)
$nsMgr.AddNamespace\('w','http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main'\)

# Extract all paragraphs including table cells
$paragraphs = $doc.SelectNodes\('//w:p', $nsMgr\)
foreach \($p in $paragraphs\) {
    $texts = $p.SelectNodes\('.//w:t', $nsMgr\)
    $line = ""
    foreach \($t in $texts\) {
        $line += $t.InnerText
    }
    if \($line -ne ""\) {
        Write-Output $line
    }
}
PSEOF)

Bash(/tmp/extract_docx6.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem

# Open file with shared read access to bypass lock
$fs = New-Object System.IO.FileStream\('C:\\projekte\\one.app\\Schadensliste.docx', [System.IO.FileMode]::Open, [System.IO.FileAccess]::Read, [System.IO.FileShare]::ReadWrite\)
$memStream = New-Object System.IO.MemoryStream
$fs.CopyTo\($memStream\)
$fs.Close\(\)
$memStream.Position = 0

$zip = New-Object System.IO.Compression.ZipArchive\($memStream, [System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Read\)

Write-Output "=== ZIP ENTRIES ==="
foreach \($e in $zip.Entries\) {
    Write-Output \("  " + $e.FullName\)
}

$entry = $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq 'word/document.xml' }
if \($entry\) {
    $stream = $entry.Open\(\)
    $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\)
    $xml = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\)
    $reader.Close\(\)

    Write-Output ""
    Write-Output "=== RAW XML LENGTH ==="
    Write-Output $xml.Length
    
    [xml]$doc = $xml
    $nsMgr = New-Object System.Xml.XmlNamespaceManager\($doc.NameTable\)
    $nsMgr.AddNamespace\('w','http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main'\)

    Write-Output ""
    Write-Output "=== EXTRACTED TEXT ==="
    $paragraphs = $doc.SelectNodes\('//w:p', $nsMgr\)
    foreach \($p in $paragraphs\) {
        $texts = $p.SelectNodes\('.//w:t', $nsMgr\)
        $line = ""
        foreach \($t in $texts\) {
            $line += $t.InnerText
        }
        Write-Output $line
    }
} else {
    Write-Output "word/document.xml not found in archive"
    Write-Output "Available entries:"
    foreach \($e in $zip.Entries\) {
        Write-Output \("  " + $e.FullName + " \(" + $e.Length + " bytes\)"\)
    }
}

$zip.Dispose\(\)
$memStream.Dispose\(\)
PSEOF)

Bash(/tmp/fix_translations.ps1 << 'YOURPSEOF'
# Fix translation issues in LocalizationManager.kt
# Replaces German text in non-DE languages for 4 keys
# Also fixes partially translated languages \(fr, es\) with correct UTF-8

$filePath = 'C:\\projekte\\one.app\\app\\src\\main\\java\\com\\uip\\oneapp\\ui\\localization\\LocalizationManager.kt'

# Read file as UTF-8
$lines = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllLines\($filePath, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\)
Write-Output "Read $\($lines.Count\) lines from file"

# Build translation lookup: lang -> key -> value
# Using Unicode escape sequences for special characters
$t = @{}

# Helper to add a language
function AddLang\($lang, $saveTo, $complete, $share, $saved\) {
    $t[$lang] = @{
        "export_save_to" = $saveTo
        "export_complete" = $complete
        "export_share" = $share
        "settings_saved" = $saved
    }
}

# NOTE: de is intentionally excluded - we never touch German translations
AddLang "no" "Lagre som..." "Eksport fullf`u00F8rt" "Del" "Innstillinger lagret"
AddLang "en" "Save to..." "Export complete" "Share" "Settings saved"
AddLang "it" "Salva in..." "Esportazione completata" "Condividi" "Impostazioni salvate"
AddLang "nl" "Opslaan als..." "Export voltooid" "Delen" "Instellingen opgeslagen"
AddLang "fr" "Enregistrer sous..." "Exportation termin`u00E9e" "Partager" "Param`u00E8tres enregistr`u00E9s"
AddLang "es" "Guardar en..." "Exportaci`u00F3n completada" "Compartir" "Ajustes guardados"
AddLang "pt" "Guardar em..." "Exporta`u00E7`u00E3o conclu`u00EDda" "Partilhar" "Defini`u00E7`u00F5es guardadas"
AddLang "pl" "Zapisz jako..." "Eksport zako`u0144czony" "Udost`u0119pnij" "Ustawienia zapisane"
AddLang "cs" "Ulo`u017Eit jako..." "Export dokon`u010Den" "Sd`u00EDlet" "Nastaven`u00ED ulo`u017Eeno"
AddLang "sk" "Ulo`u017Ei`u0165 ako..." "Export dokon`u010Den`u00FD" "Zdie`u013Ea`u0165" "Nastavenia ulo`u017Een`u00E9"
AddLang "sl" "Shrani kot..." "Izvoz kon`u010Dan" "Deli" "Nastavitve shranjene"
AddLang "hr" "Spremi kao..." "Izvoz zavr`u0161en" "Podijeli" "Postavke spremljene"
AddLang "hu" "Ment`u00E9s m`u00E1sk`u00E9nt..." "Export`u00E1l`u00E1s k`u00E9sz" "Megoszt`u00E1s" "Be`u00E1ll`u00EDt`u00E1sok mentve"
AddLang "ro" "Salvare ca..." "Export finalizat" "Partajare" "Set`u0103ri salvate"

# For scripts with non-Latin chars, build strings programmatically
# Bulgarian \(Cyrillic\)
$t["bg"] = @{
    "export_save_to" = "`u0417`u0430`u043F`u0430`u0437`u0438 `u043A`u0430`u0442`u043E..."
    "export_complete" = "`u0415`u043A`u0441`u043F`u043E`u0440`u0442`u044A`u0442 `u0437`u0430`u0432`u044A`u0440`u0448`u0435`u043D"
    "export_share" = "`u0421`u043F`u043E`u0434`u0435`u043B`u044F`u043D`u0435"
    "settings_saved" = "`u041D`u0430`u0441`u0442`u0440`u043E`u0439`u043A`u0438`u0442`u0435 `u0441`u0430 `u0437`u0430`u043F`u0430`u0437`u0435`u043D`u0438"
}

# Greek
$t["el"] = @{
    "export_save_to" = "`u0391`u03C0`u03BF`u03B8`u03AE`u03BA`u03B5`u03C5`u03C3`u03B7 `u03C9`u03C2..."
    "export_complete" = "`u0395`u03BE`u03B1`u03B3`u03C9`u03B3`u03AE `u03BF`u03BB`u03BF`u03BA`u03BB`u03B7`u03C1`u03CE`u03B8`u03B7`u03BA`u03B5"
    "export_share" = "`u039A`u03BF`u03B9`u03BD`u03BF`u03C0`u03BF`u03AF`u03B7`u03C3`u03B7"
    "settings_saved" = "`u03A1`u03C5`u03B8`u03BC`u03AF`u03C3`u03B5`u03B9`u03C2 `u03B1`u03C0`u03BF`u03B8`u03B7`u03BA`u03B5`u03CD`u03C4`u03B7`u03BA`u03B1`u03BD"
}

AddLang "da" "Gem som..." "Eksport fuldf`u00F8rt" "Del" "Indstillinger gemt"
AddLang "sv" "Spara som..." "Export klar" "Dela" "Inst`u00E4llningar sparade"
AddLang "fi" "Tallenna nimell`u00E4..." "Vienti valmis" "Jaa" "Asetukset tallennettu"
AddLang "et" "Salvesta kui..." "Eksport l`u00F5petatud" "Jaga" "Seaded salvestatud"
AddLang "lv" "Saglab`u0101t k`u0101..." "Eksports pabeigts" "Kop`u012Bgot" "Iestat`u012Bjumi saglab`u0101ti"
AddLang "lt" "I`u0161saugoti kaip..." "Eksportas baigtas" "Dalintis" "Nustatymai i`u0161saugoti"
AddLang "ga" "S`u00E1bh`u00E1il mar..." "Easp`u00F3rt`u00E1il cr`u00EDochnaithe" "Comhroinn" "Socruithe s`u00E1bh`u00E1ilte"
AddLang "mt" "Issejvja b`u0127ala..." "Esportazzjoni lesta" "Aqsam" "Settings issejvjati"

# Arabic
$t["ar"] = @{
    "export_save_to" = "`u062D`u0641`u0638 `u0628`u0627`u0633`u0645..."
    "export_complete" = "`u0627`u0643`u062A`u0645`u0644 `u0627`u0644`u062A`u0635`u062F`u064A`u0631"
    "export_share" = "`u0645`u0634`u0627`u0631`u0643`u0629"
    "settings_saved" = "`u062A`u0645 `u062D`u0641`u0638 `u0627`u0644`u0625`u0639`u062F`u0627`u062F`u0627`u062A"
}

# Russian \(Cyrillic\)
$t["ru"] = @{
    "export_save_to" = "`u0421`u043E`u0445`u0440`u0430`u043D`u0438`u0442`u044C `u043A`u0430`u043A..."
    "export_complete" = "`u042D`u043A`u0441`u043F`u043E`u0440`u0442 `u0437`u0430`u0432`u0435`u0440`u0448`u0451`u043D"
    "export_share" = "`u041F`u043E`u0434`u0435`u043B`u0438`u0442`u044C`u0441`u044F"
    "settings_saved" = "`u041D`u0430`u0441`u0442`u0440`u043E`u0439`u043A`u0438 `u0441`u043E`u0445`u0440`u0430`u043D`u0435`u043D`u044B"
}

AddLang "tr" "Farkl`u0131 kaydet..." "D`u0131`u015Fa aktarma tamamland`u0131" "Payla`u015F" "Ayarlar kaydedildi"

# Serbian \(Latin\)
AddLang "sr" "Sa`u010Duvaj kao..." "Izvoz zavr`u0161en" "Podeli" "Pode`u0161avanja sa`u010Duvana"

# Albanian
AddLang "sq" "Ruaj si..." "Eksporti p`u00EBrfundoi" "Ndaj" "Cil`u00EBsimet u ruajt`u00EBn"

# Chinese
$t["zh"] = @{
    "export_save_to" = "`u53E6`u5B58`u4E3A..."
    "export_complete" = "`u5BFC`u51FA`u5B8C`u6210"
    "export_share" = "`u5206`u4EAB"
    "settings_saved" = "`u8BBE`u7F6E`u5DF2`u4FDD`u5B58"
}

# Japanese
$t["ja"] = @{
    "export_save_to" = "`u540D`u524D`u3092`u4ED8`u3051`u3066`u4FDD`u5B58..."
    "export_complete" = "`u30A8`u30AF`u30B9`u30DD`u30FC`u30C8`u5B8C`u4E86"
    "export_share" = "`u5171`u6709"
    "settings_saved" = "`u8A2D`u5B9A`u3092`u4FDD`u5B58`u3057`u307E`u3057`u305F"
}

# Korean
$t["ko"] = @{
    "export_save_to" = "`uB2E4`uB978 `uC774`uB984`uC73C`u B85C `u C800`u C7A5..."
    "export_complete" = "`u B0B4`u BCF4`u B0B4`u AE30 `u C644`u B8CC"
    "export_share" = "`u ACF5`u C720"
    "settings_saved" = "`u C124`u C815`u C774 `u C800`u C7A5`u B418`u C5C8`u C2B5`u B2C8`u B2E4"
}

# Indonesian \(Latin, no special chars\)
AddLang "id" "Simpan sebagai..." "Ekspor selesai" "Bagikan" "Pengaturan tersimpan"

# Thai
$t["th"] = @{
    "export_save_to" = "`u0E1A`u0E31`u0E19`u0E17`u0E36`u0E01`u0E40`u0E1B`u0E47`u0E19..."
    "export_complete" = "`u0E2A`u0E48`u0E07`u0E2D`u0E2D`u0E01`u0E40`u0E2A`u0E23`u0E47`u0E08`u0E2A`u0E34`u0E49`u0E19"
    "export_share" = "`u0E41`u0E0A`u0E23`u0E4C"
    "settings_saved" = "`u0E1A`u0E31`u0E19`u0E17`u0E36`u0E01`u0E01`u0E32`u0E23`u0E15`u0E31`u0E49`u0E07`u0E04`u0E48`u0E32`u0E41`u0E25`u0E49`u0E27"
}

Write-Output "Defined translations for $\($t.Count\) languages \(excluding de\)"

# Now process the file
$currentLang = ""
$changeCount = 0

for \($i = 0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++\) {
    # Detect which language function we're in
    if \($lines[$i] -match 'private fun \(\\w+\)Translations'\) {
        $currentLang = $Matches[1]
    }
    
    # Skip German - those are correct
    if \($currentLang -eq "de"\) { continue }
    
    # Check if this language has translations defined
    if \(-not $t.ContainsKey\($currentLang\)\) { continue }
    
    $langT = $t[$currentLang]
    
    # Check each key and replace if the line contains it
    foreach \($key in @\("export_save_to", "export_complete", "export_share", "settings_saved"\)\) {
        if \($lines[$i] -match "^\(\\s*`"$key`" to `"\)\(.+?\)\(`",?\\s*\)$"\) {
            $oldVal = $Matches[2]
            $newVal = $langT[$key]
            if \($oldVal -ne $newVal\) {
                $lines[$i] = $Matches[1] + $newVal + $Matches[3]
                $changeCount++
                Write-Output "[$currentLang] $key : '$oldVal' -> '$newVal'"
            }
        }
    }
}

Write-Output ""
Write-Output "Total changes: $changeCount"

# Write back as UTF-8 without BOM
$utf8NoBom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllLines\($filePath, $lines, $utf8NoBom\)
Write-Output "File saved as UTF-8 without BOM"
YOURPSEOF)
